headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Brush Off
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Piper Sandler Initiates Coverage On Bio-Techne with Neutral Rating, Announces Price Target of $65
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst David Westenberg   initiates coverage on Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) with a Neutral rating and announces Price Target of $65.
